hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd /Users/shawnphillips/Projects/PM\ Agent/backend && source venv/bin/activate && ruff check $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>&1 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.(jsx?|js)$'; then cd /Users/shawnphillips/Projects/PM\ Agent/frontend && npx eslint $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>&1 || true; fi
cd /Users/shawnphillips/Projects/PM\ Agent/backend && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -5
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH" && cd /Users/shawnphillips/Projects/PM\ Agent/frontend && npx vitest run 2>&1 | tail -5
